tabs.company_desc: Company details, logo and email accounts.

company.company_name_desc: The official name of your company as it appears on invoices.
company.managing_director_desc: Name of the authorised managing director.
company.address_desc: The main office of your company.
company.contact_desc: Public contact information for your clients.
company.opening_hours_note: * Changes will be applied when company settings are saved
company.bank_desc: Your IBAN and BIC for transfers (appears on invoices).
company.legal_form_desc: The official legal form of your company (e.g. GmbH).
company.tax_office_desc: Assigned tax office for your tax return.
company.tax_number_desc: Your tax number registered with the tax office.
company.vat_id_desc: VAT identification number for EU-wide trade.
company.currency_desc: The default currency for your system.
company.logo_upload_desc: Your logo appears on invoices and documents. Max. 4 MB (PNG, JPG, SVG).
company.logo_hint: PNG, JPG or SVG · max. 4 MB
company.validation_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.

invoice.tax_rate_required: Tax rate and label are required.
invoice.payment_days_desc: Select the default payment term for new invoices. This can be adjusted per invoice.
invoice.payment_text_desc: The text that appears on your invoices as payment terms. Use {days} as a placeholder.
invoice.labor_cost_desc: Show a labour cost note on invoices (required by law for private customers for trade services).
invoice.tax_manage_desc: Enter the tax rates and associated paragraphs you need for invoices and quotes.
invoice.invoice_intro_desc: The introductory text that appears on every invoice.
invoice.invoice_intro_helper: This text appears after the salutation on the invoice.
invoice.invoice_closing_desc: The closing text below the line items on the invoice.
invoice.credit_note_intro_desc: Text for automatically created credit notes (cancellations).
invoice.offer_closing_desc: Closing text for quotes including validity.
invoice.sender_line_desc: The small sender line above the recipient address field. Can be hidden if printing on your own letterhead.
invoice.footer_desc: The footer contains your company details, contact info and bank account. Choose between standard (3 columns) and custom footer.
invoice.footer_custom_hint: In custom mode you can freely design each footer column. Column content is configured in the print preview.
invoice.layout_desc: Choose one of the three available layouts. The layout determines the basic structure of your invoice PDF.
invoice.layout_din5008_desc: Classic business letter format according to DIN standard
invoice.layout_modern_desc: Coloured header, contemporary design with accent colours
invoice.layout_classic_desc: Formal style with centred header, serif font
invoice.font_desc: The font for your invoice PDFs. Note that not all fonts are available on all systems.
invoice.font_size_desc: The base font size for the invoice. Larger is more readable, smaller fits more content per page.
invoice.color_desc: The accent colour for lines, headings and the header (Modern layout). Affects the overall appearance of the invoice.
invoice.logo_desc: Your logo appears on all generated invoice PDFs. Upload it under Company Data.

number_circles.format_desc: Structure and components of the ID.
number_circles.reset_yearly_desc: Counter is automatically reset to the start number on 01/01.
